author: pzydron
name: 5L MLP×4 EMA=0.97 Optuna v1 — GH200 MIG proxy
blurb: Proxy-scale submission (GH200 MIG 3g.48gb, 600s). 5-layer 512-dim GQA+XSA transformer with MLP×4, Bigram-4096+1024dim bypass layer, EMA=0.97, Optuna v1 TPE optimizer tuning (25 trials). val_bpb=1.3246 (float, post-EMA) / 1.3069 (int6+zlib, stride=64). Not a SOTA record — proxy hardware. Requesting H100 access for full competition run.
technique_summary: 5-layer 512-dim GQA+XSA, MLP×4, Bigram-4096+1024dim, EMA=0.97, Optuna v1 TPE (25 trials), int6+zlib
